title: Mount Unabetsu
summary: Mount Unabetsu (海別岳, Unabetsu-dake) is a Quaternary stratovolcano. Its summit is 1,419.3 metres (4,656 ft). It is located on Hokkaido's Shiretoko Peninsula on the border of Shari in Shari District, Abashiri and Shibetsu in Shibetsu District, Nemuro.
text:
Mount Unabetsu (海別岳, Unabetsu-dake) is a Quaternary stratovolcano. Its summit is 1,419.3 metres (4,656 ft). It is located on Hokkaido's Shiretoko Peninsula on the border of Shari in Shari District, Abashiri and Shibetsu in Shibetsu District, Nemuro.

Geology
The mountain is made mainly of andesite and basalt.
